module.name: unitcircle
module.description: The trig unit circle with a marked angle: radius, sin (vertical) and cos (horizontal) segments, angle arc, and optional numeric values.
module.aiSpec:
The trigonometric UNIT CIRCLE with one angle drawn: the radius to the point, the sin segment (vertical, colored), the cos segment (horizontal), and the angle arc θ. Block module with NO body — everything is set via params. Params: `angle` — the angle in DEGREES (default 40; range -360..360), `values` — true → print sin/cos numeric values next to the segments (default false), `color` — accent colour for the radius / point / arc (default var(--accent-color)), `sincolor` — colour of the sin segment and its label (default "#dc2626" red), `coscolor` — colour of the cos segment and its label (default "#2563eb" blue), `maxwidth` — rendered max width, any CSS length (default "320px").
<!-- @unitcircle angle: 135, values: true, sincolor: #16a34a -->

param.name: angle
param.label: Angle (degrees)
param.desc: Angle to draw, in degrees (positive = counter-clockwise).

param.name: values
param.label: Show sin/cos values
param.desc: Print the numeric sin and cos values instead of the symbols.

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Colour of the radius, point and angle arc.

param.name: sincolor
param.label: Sin color
param.desc: Colour of the vertical sin segment and its label.

param.name: coscolor
param.label: Cos color
param.desc: Colour of the horizontal cos segment and its label.

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max width
param.desc: Rendered maximum width, any CSS length, e.g. 320px or 18em.

snippet.label: Unit circle (angle)
snippet.description: Unit circle with radius, sin/cos segments and the angle arc.
